name: Amanda (2010 Games)
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2010/1 (official CrossFit Games event, individual division), retrieved 2026-07-10; the classic Girl WOD Amanda, reused as a Games event. Note: this repo's original research pass initially mis-attributed a team-division thruster/pull-up/buddy-carry workout to this event slot; corrected after cross-referencing a second source
